headline: VICI Properties Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: VICI Properties (NYSE:VICI) reported first-quarter 2026 results on April 30, highlighting what management described as continued execution on external growth, balance sheet discipline, and a strategy centered on “experiential” real estate. Executives also raised full-year 2026 adjusted funds from op
